package.sql:
DECLARE v_pat_key NUMBER; v_encounter_key NUMBER; BEGIN v_pat_key := sp_mapper.put_patient( 'ADT^A04', -- event_type @PID.PATIENT_ID, -- patient_id null, -- prior_patient_id @PID.ID_ISSUER_CODE, -- patient_id_issuer_code null, -- patient_ssn @PID.FULL_NAME, -- patient_name null, -- last_name null, -- first_name null, -- middle_name null, -- prefix null, -- suffix null, -- marital_stat null, -- confidentiality @PID.DATE_OF_BIRTH, -- patient_birth_dttm null, -- patient_death_dttm @PID.ADMINISTRATIVE_SEX, -- patient_sex null, -- patient_size null, -- patient_weight null, -- blood_type_abo null, -- blood_type_rh null, -- citizenship null, -- occupation null, -- race_code null, -- language_code null, -- religion_code null, -- birthplace null, -- multiple_birth_status null, -- birth_order null, -- email null, -- phone_no null, -- pregnancy_code null, -- patient_stat null, -- account_no null, -- contact_type null, -- home_phone_no null, -- busi_phone_no null, -- fax_no null, -- address null, -- city null, -- state null, -- country null, -- zipcode null, -- visit_number null, -- visit_stat null, -- admit_dttm null, -- discharge_dttm null, -- patient_location null, -- patient_residence null, -- refer_doctor_id null, -- consult_doctor_id null, -- institution_code null, -- visit_comment null, -- admit_route null, -- lastmen_strual_dttm null, -- pregnancy_status null, -- code_abbreviation null, -- station_code null, -- english_name null, -- ethnic_group null, -- current_department null, -- refer_doctor_name null, -- consult_doctor_name null, -- broker_aetitle 'HL7-PACS' -- broker_type );
IF v_pat_key > 0 THEN v_encounter_key := sp_mapper.put_encounter( 'ENCOUNTER', -- event_type @PID.PATIENT_ID, -- patient_id null, -- prior_patient_id @PID.ID_ISSUER_CODE, -- patient_id_issuer_code @PID.FULL_NAME, -- patient_name null, -- other_patient_id null, -- other_patient_name @PID.DATE_OF_BIRTH, -- patient_birth_dttm @PID.ADMINISTRATIVE_SEX, -- patient_sex null, -- patient_location null, -- patient_residency null, -- department null, -- attend_doctor_id null, -- refer_doctor_id null, -- consult_doctor_id null, -- visit_number TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMddHH24mmss'), -- admit_dttm null -- discharge_dttm ); END IF; END;

SELECT 'ORF' AS MESSAGE_TYPE, 'R04' AS EVENT_TYPE, 'ORF_R04' AS MESSAGE_STRUCTURE, 'R' AS OBJECT_TYPE, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, r.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, NVL(r.alink_key, 0) AS ALINK_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS EXAM_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, c.userid AS CREATE_USERID, c.user_name AS CREATE_USERNAME, TO_CHAR(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATE_USERID, d.user_name AS dictate_username, TO_CHAR(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBE_USERID, t.user_name AS trancribe_username, TO_CHAR(r.transcribe_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVE_USERID, a.user_name AS APPROVE_USERNAME, a.last_name AS APPROVE_LASTNAME, a.first_name AS APPROVE_FIRSTNAME, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISE_USERID, v.user_name AS REVISE_USERNAME, TO_CHAR(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISION_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT, -- sp_mapper.get_report_html(s.access_no) AS REPORT_HTML, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.institution AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, s.department AS PERFORM_DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, ur.last_name AS REFER_DOCTOR_LAST_NAME, ur.first_name AS REFER_DOCTOR_FIRST_NAME, ur.middle_name AS REFER_DOCTOR_MIDDLE_NAME, ur.suffix AS REFER_DOCTOR_SUFFIX, ur.prefix AS REFER_DOCTOR_PREFIX, TO_CHAR(s.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, p.last_name AS PATIENT_LAST_NAME, p.first_name AS PATIENT_FIRST_NAME, p.middle_name AS PATIENT_MIDDLE_NAME, p.prefix AS PATIENT_PREFIX, p.suffix AS PATIENT_SUFFIX, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.study_id AS ADMISSION_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, s.operators AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_NAME, ua.userid AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_ID, ua.last_name AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_LAST_NAME, ua.first_name AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_FIRST_NAME, ua.middle_name AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_MIDDLE_NAME, ua.suffix AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_SUFFIX, ua.prefix AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_PREFIX, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, p.account_no AS PATIENT_ACCOUNT_NO FROM report r, study s, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, patient p, users ur, users ua WHERE s.access_no = @QRF.OTHER_QRY_SUBJECT_FILTER AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id AND r.creator_key = C.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = A.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+) AND s.refer_doctor = ur.user_name(+) AND s.operators = ua.user_name(+)

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, ms.placer_order_id AS PLACER_ORDER_ID, ms.filler_order_id AS FILLER_ORDER_ID, ms.accession_no AS EXAM_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, mp.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, mp.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, TO_CHAR(mp.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, mp.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, (SELECT userid FROM users WHERE user_key = o.order_doctor_key) AS ORDER_DOCTOR_ID, (SELECT user_name FROM users WHERE user_key = o.order_doctor_key) AS ORDER_DOCTOR_NAME, (SELECT userid FROM users WHERE user_key = m.perform_doctor_key) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR_ID, (SELECT user_name FROM users WHERE user_key = m.perform_doctor_key) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR_NAME FROM study s, mpps mp, mppssps ms, iOrder o, msps m, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORM' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type = 'MP' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE s.study_key IN q.object_key AND mp.mpps_key = ms.mpps_key AND ms.study_key = s.study_key AND m.study_key = s.study_key AND o.order_key = s.order_key ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS STUDY_ADDENDUM_STAT, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT, SP_MAPPER.GET_ALLREPORTS(r.report_key, 0) AS ALL_REPORT_TEXT, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR_ID, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, v.pathname || '\' || g.pathname || '\' || g.filename AS PDF_FILE_PATH FROM report r, study s, patient p, volume v, generalFileLoc g, pdfConverterQueue pcq, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type in ('R', 'A') AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE r.report_key IN q.object_key AND r.report_key = pcq.report_key(+) AND pcq.convert_stat(+) = 'Y' AND pcq.general_file_key = g.general_file_key(+) AND g.volume_code = v.volume_code(+) AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.study_stat > 230 AND s.patient_id_issuer = p.patient_id_issuer AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS STUDY_ADDENDUM_STAT, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR_ID, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, v.pathname || '\' || g.pathname || '\' || g.filename AS PDF_FILE_PATH FROM study s, patient pa, pdfConverterQueue pcq, generalFileLoc g, volume v, report r, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, pdf_queue_key, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, pdf_queue_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS retry_count FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type = 'PDF' AND pdf_queue_key IS NOT NULL AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE pcq.pdf_queue_key IN q.pdf_queue_key AND pcq.convert_stat = 'Y' AND pcq.general_file_key = g.general_file_key AND g.volume_code = v.volume_code AND pa.patient_id_issuer = s.patient_id_issuer AND pa.patient_id = s.patient_id AND pcq.study_key = s.study_key AND r.report_key = sp_report.lookup_last_report_key(s.study_key) ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS STUDY_ADDENDUM_STAT, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR_ID, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, r.digital_sign_flag AS DIGITAL_SIGN_FLAG, r.digital_sign_data AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DATA, r.digital_sign_dttm AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DTTM, r.certificate_dn AS CERTIFICATE_DN, r.digital_sign_key AS DIGITAL_SIGN_KEY FROM report r, study s, patient p, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type in ('R', 'A') AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE r.report_key IN q.object_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.study_stat > 230 AND s.patient_id_issuer = p.patient_id_issuer AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.TRIGGER_DTTM, q.REPLICA_DTTM, q.MESSAGE_TYPE, q.EVENT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_KEY, q.ROUTE_STAT, q.RETRY_COUNT FROM (SELECT routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, object_key AS OBJECT_KEY, route_stat AS ROUTE_STAT, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'MWL' AND route_stat = 'N' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) q WHERE rownum < 1000

SELECT q.ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.TRIGGER_DTTM, q.REPLICA_DTTM, q.MESSAGE_TYPE, q.EVENT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_KEY, q.ROUTE_STAT, q.RETRY_COUNT FROM (SELECT routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, object_key AS OBJECT_KEY, route_stat AS ROUTE_STAT, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'MFN' AND route_stat = 'N' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) q WHERE rownum < 1000

SELECT q.ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.TRIGGER_DTTM, q.REPLICA_DTTM, q.MESSAGE_TYPE, q.EVENT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_KEY, q.ROUTE_STAT, q.RETRY_COUNT FROM (SELECT routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, object_key AS PATIENT_ID, route_stat AS ROUTE_STAT, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ADT' AND event_type = 'A04' AND object_type = 'EBIW' AND route_stat = 'N' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) q WHERE rownum < 1000
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = 'Y', replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = CASE WHEN NVL(retry_count, 0) >= 2 THEN 'E' ELSE 'N' END, retry_count = NVL(retry_count, 0) + 1, replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY

SELECT cvr_key AS CVR_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, study_key AS STUDY_KEY, access_no AS ACCESS_NO, patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, userid AS USER_ID, memo AS MEMO FROM cvr WHERE replica_dttm IS null ORDER BY cvr_key ASC
UPDATE cvr SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE cvr_key = @CVR_KEY
UPDATE cvr SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE cvr_key = @CVR_KEY
SELECT 1 AS ONE FROM DUAL
SELECT 1 AS ONE FROM DUAL

SELECT se.svc_cd AS SVC_CD, se.inu_cd AS INU_CD, i.inu_nm AS INU_NM, se.faclt_cd AS FACLT_CD, f.faclt_nm AS FACLT_NM, se.sys_cd AS SYS_CD, sy.sys_nm AS SYS_NM FROM instMst i, facilityMst f, sysMst sy, service se WHERE se.inu_cd = i.inu_cd AND se.faclt_cd = f.faclt_cd AND se.sys_cd = sy.sys_cd AND se.act_stat = 'V' AND se.faclt_cd = sy.faclt_cd ORDER BY se.svc_cd ASC
SELECT cntt_catg_key, cntt_catg_nm FROM contentCatg WHERE inu_cd = @INSTITUTION_CODE AND faclt_cd = @FACILITY_CODE AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT cntt_catg_typ_key, cntt_catg_typ_nm FROM contentType WHERE cntt_catg_key = @CNTT_CATG_KEY AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT mime_typ_grp_key, mime_typ_grp_nm FROM mimeTypeGroup ORDER BY mime_typ_grp_nm ASC
SELECT mime_typ_key, mime_file_ex, mime_typ, mime_desc FROM mimeType WHERE mime_typ_grp_key = @MIME_TYP_GRP_KEY ORDER BY mime_file_ex ASC
SELECT inter_http FROM stationMst WHERE svc_cd = @SERVICE_CODE AND prod_key = (SELECT prod_key FROM productMst WHERE prod_nm = 'CONTENTUPLOADER') AND use_yn = 'Y' AND rownum = 1
SELECT p.pf_val AS PF_VAL FROM sysProfileMst pm, sysProfile p WHERE pm.pf_key = p.pf_key AND pm.pf_sec = 'SECURITY' AND pm.pf_entry = 'AUTHORIZATION_SERVER_HTTP_BASE_URL' AND pm.pf_lv = 'IHP'
